_note: Control Center — Raspbian Lite upgrade, PyQt5 X stack, OctoPrint compat, kernel tuning. Sprint: 2026-06-09 to 2026-06-13. Assignee: Swaminath (101084655).

tasks.name: Build Raspbian Lite baseline image
tasks.description:
Deliver a reproducible Raspberry Pi OS Lite baseline image suitable for Control Center deployment.

Prerequisites: none
Done when: baseline boots and setup script completes on target hardware.

subtasks.name: Lock target Raspberry Pi OS Lite version and architecture
subtasks.description:
Pin the exact Pi OS Lite release and CPU architecture. Document in version manifest.
Done when: version and architecture are recorded in the manifest file.

subtasks.name: Install minimal required system packages for Control Center stack
subtasks.description:
Install only the packages required by Control Center and its dependencies on the clean Lite image.
Done when: package list is validated against a known-good dependency matrix.

subtasks.name: Create reproducible baseline setup script with version manifest
subtasks.description:
Write a single idempotent setup script that reproduces the baseline from a fresh Lite image.
Done when: running the script on a clean image produces a working baseline without manual steps.

tasks.name: Enable PyQt5 X runtime via xinit
tasks.description:
Bring up minimal X environment and run Control Center reliably via xinit.

Prerequisites: baseline image exists and boots
Done when: Control Center auto-starts after reboot and UI is usable.

subtasks.name: Install minimal Xorg and xinit packages on Lite image
subtasks.description:
Identify and install the smallest Xorg + xinit package set that supports PyQt5 rendering.
Done when: xinit can start an X session without errors.

subtasks.name: Configure xinit startup to launch Control Center PyQt5 app
subtasks.description:
Create .xinitrc or equivalent that launches Control Center on X start.
Done when: xinit starts and Control Center window is visible.

subtasks.name: Validate auto-start after reboot and basic UI responsiveness
subtasks.description:
Reboot the device and confirm Control Center starts automatically and responds to input.
Done when: tested on two reboots with no manual intervention required.

tasks.name: Upgrade OctoPrint to latest stable
tasks.description:
Upgrade backend OctoPrint to current stable version with safe configuration migration.

Prerequisites: baseline image and network access
Done when: service starts, API is reachable, and Control Center can query printer state.

subtasks.name: Install latest stable OctoPrint in isolated Python environment
subtasks.description:
Install OctoPrint latest stable in a dedicated virtualenv. Pin version in manifest.
Done when: OctoPrint service starts successfully.

subtasks.name: Migrate existing configuration and verify service startup
subtasks.description:
Copy existing printer profiles, users, and settings. Verify OctoPrint starts without config errors.
Done when: all prior settings are present and service is healthy.

subtasks.name: Verify API connectivity and baseline printer state retrieval
subtasks.description:
Make an authenticated API call from Control Center to OctoPrint and retrieve printer connection state.
Done when: Control Center can see printer status via the API.

tasks.name: Update Control Center for OctoPrint compatibility
tasks.description:
Ensure Control Center works with latest OctoPrint while preserving legacy fallback where required.

Prerequisites: OctoPrint upgraded and reachable
Done when: login and core printer commands work on target OctoPrint version.

subtasks.name: Implement OctoPrint version detection in Control Center backend client
subtasks.description:
Add version detection at startup so Control Center knows which API behaviour to use.
Done when: version is read from /api/version and stored in session state.

subtasks.name: Update breaking auth or API calls for latest OctoPrint
subtasks.description:
Identify and fix all Control Center API calls that changed or broke in the new OctoPrint version.
Done when: no API call fails against the latest OctoPrint with a 4xx or 5xx.

subtasks.name: Retain legacy login or API fallback path for backward compatibility
subtasks.description:
Keep old code paths active and gate them behind version check so old installs still work.
Done when: Control Center passes basic smoke test against both old and new OctoPrint versions.

tasks.name: Tune Linux kernel boot and performance settings
tasks.description:
Apply stability-first kernel and boot parameter tuning for 3D-printer hardware on Raspberry Pi.

Prerequisites: baseline image boots
Done when: print-path services are stable and no regressions are observed on a test print.

subtasks.name: Configure boot startup files for stable USB serial and low-latency I/O
subtasks.description:
Edit /boot/config.txt and cmdline.txt for USB serial stability and reduced I/O latency.
Done when: USB serial connection to printer MCU is stable across reboot.

subtasks.name: Disable non-essential services and modules to reduce jitter
subtasks.description:
Identify and disable system services and kernel modules not needed for printer operation.
Done when: systemd service list is reviewed and non-essential items are masked.

subtasks.name: Set safe memory, thermal, and swap behavior for long print sessions
subtasks.description:
Configure swap policy, OOM handling, and thermal throttle thresholds for unattended long prints.
Done when: device survives a 4+ hour test print without thermal throttle or OOM events.

tasks.name: Run end-to-end validation and rollback check
tasks.description:
Validate critical Control Center plus OctoPrint workflows and prove rollback path exists.

Prerequisites: all above tasks complete
Done when: validation checklist passes and rollback is documented and tested.

subtasks.name: Validate login, session persistence, and user management flows
subtasks.description:
Log in to Control Center, verify session persists across network interruption, and confirm user management works.
Done when: login, session, and user creation pass without errors.

subtasks.name: Validate printer connect and start/pause/resume/cancel flows
subtasks.description:
Connect to a live printer, start a print, pause, resume, and cancel. Confirm state is reflected correctly in UI.
Done when: all four commands succeed and printer state updates in Control Center UI.

subtasks.name: Execute rollback to previous image and document recovery steps
subtasks.description:
Reflash the previous known-good image, confirm the printer is operational, and write the rollback runbook.
Done when: rollback runbook is written and rollback was executed successfully at least once.
